ItacPersonItem.Notes: Teacher of the Greek language in the Ferrarese Studium. See Giusto Fontanini, Biblioteca dell`eloquenza italiana, con le note di Apostolo Zeno, vol. I (Venezia, 1740), p. 125.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
